name: Five Parsecs Crew Task Resolution
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules pp.76-82
description: Resolution mechanics for all 8 crew tasks per Core Rules.

FIND_PATRON.name: Find a Patron
FIND_PATRON.description: Search for a patron willing to offer work. Roll 1D6, 5+ = one patron, 6+ = two patrons.

success_one.description: You find a patron willing to offer work

success_two.description: You find two patrons willing to offer work

failure.description: No suitable patrons are found this turn

TRAIN.name: Train
TRAIN.description: Character trains and automatically earns 1 XP. Check for Character Upgrade (p.123).

TRADE.name: Trade
TRADE.description: Roll D100 on the Trade Table (p.79). Each crew member trading rolls once. Extra rolls cost 3 credits each.
TRADE.notes: No skill or world modifiers. Pure D100 roll on Trade Table.

RECRUIT.name: Recruit
RECRUIT.description: If crew < 6: automatic recruit. If crew >= 6: roll 1D6 + number of crew recruiting, 6+ = new recruit.
RECRUIT.recruit_profile: Random character creation (p.14), basic profile, Handgun

EXPLORE.name: Explore
EXPLORE.description: Roll D100 on the Exploration Table (p.80). Each crew member exploring rolls once.
EXPLORE.notes: No skill or world modifiers. Pure D100 roll on Exploration Table.

TRACK.name: Track
TRACK.description: Track down a Rival. Roll 1D6, modified by crew count and credits spent.

success.description: You successfully track down the Rival and may fight them this turn

REPAIR_KIT.name: Repair
REPAIR_KIT.description: Attempt to repair a damaged item. Roll 1D6+Savvy, 6+ = success. Engineer: +1. Natural 1 = item destroyed. Can spend credits.
REPAIR_KIT.natural_1_effect: Item is destroyed and must be removed from inventory

success.description: The damaged item is successfully repaired

failure.description: Repair attempt fails. Item remains damaged.

critical_failure.description: The item is destroyed beyond repair

DECOY.name: Decoy
DECOY.description: Passive: each crew member assigned as Decoy adds +1 to Rival avoidance roll. No dice roll needed.
DECOY.notes: No dice roll. Decoy is a passive modifier, not an active task resolution.

task_assignment_rules.one_task_per_crew: Each crew member can perform one task per campaign turn
task_assignment_rules.sick_bay_restriction: Crew members in Sick Bay cannot be assigned tasks
